description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure with a modern, urban fashion sense, featuring a fitted jacket with elaborate gold dragon and flame motifs on the shoulders and sleeves. The figure has a muscular build and stands in a neutral pose with arms slightly outstretched. The jacket is worn over a deep V-neck shirt, and the pants are slim-fit with utility pockets, paired with clean, casual sneakers. The most striking feature is the ornate golden dragon sculpture draped over the left shoulder, adding a fantasy or high-fashion element. The back of the jacket displays a large embroidered dragon and some stylized writing. The figure's hair is styled in a voluminous, swept-back fashion, giving a trendy and confident appearance.
description: A fashionable adult male figure in a fitted jacket with gold dragon and flame motifs, slim-fit pants, and sneakers, featuring a dramatic golden dragon accessory on the shoulder.
description_view_0: Front view shows the detailed jacket, deep V-neck shirt, flame motifs on the sleeves, and the golden dragon accessory draped over the left shoulder.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the golden dragon on the shoulder and the slim fit of the pants and jacket.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the large embroidered dragon and stylized writing on the back of the jacket, as well as the symmetrical flame motifs on both sleeves.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the continuation of the flame motif and the clean lines of the outfit, with the dragon accessory visible from the back.
attribute_clothing_type: urban fashion jacket with elaborate shoulder accessory, deep V-neck shirt, slim-fit utility pants
